name: chain_ph_launch_cursor_glass_unified_agent_
method: [PH LAUNCH] Cursor Glass: Unified agent workspace with seamless cloud handoff power

stages.task: Hit PH API daily, filter launches tagged 'developer-tools', 'productivity', 'ai-assistant', 'agents'. Extract maker profiles, Twitter/X handles, product URLs.
Score each launch: vote count >50 = hot, 10-49 = warm, <10 = cold. Filter for solo founders or small teams (more likely to need services). Enrich with founder LinkedIn if available.

Generate personalized cold outreach referencing their specific PH launch. Angle: 'Saw Cursor Glass launch — we built similar agent orchestration infra. Want to see our stack?' Send via custom cold email script within 48h.
